this_title: America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders Season 3
trans_title: 美国甜心：达拉斯牛仔啦啦队 第三季
introduction: Season 3 of America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders has been renewed and will be released on Netflix in 2026, following the team's 2025-2026 season. Filming is currently underway, capturing auditions and the kickoff of the NFL season for the new squad led by Kelli Finglass and Judy Trammell.
chinese_title: 美国甜心：达拉斯牛仔啦啦队 第三季
foreign_title: America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders Season 3
